case_title: AHERN RENTALS, INC. VS. ERROL THODOS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHERN RENTALS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THODOS, ERROL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHERN RENTALS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THODOS, ERROL $21,654.14 PRINCIPAL, $2,836.94 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,861.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $2,836.94 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHERN RENTALS, INC.
